summary: Gwanak is Seoul's traditional progressive stronghold, anchored by Seoul National University and long-running left-wing organizing. DPK wins in both subs (박민규 57.08, 정태호 57.97). 2020 runner-up 김성식 was an independent — unusual for Seoul.

issues.label: University-youth base
issues.description: SNU presence and Shinrim student/cultural cluster produce reliably progressive electorate.

issues.label: Progressive identity
issues.description: Long-standing left-leaning political culture, often associated with 1980s movement alumni networks.

issues.label: Younger age profile
issues.description: Lower median age than outer Seoul gu.
